Title 20 Zoning
20.30.460 Accessory Dwelling Units

The purpose of this chapter is to establish standards for accessory dwelling units and junior accessory dwelling units consistent with the California Government Code. One accessory dwelling unit shall be permitted per lot developed with a single-family dwelling. The minimum side and rear yard setback shall be four feet. No owner occupancy shall be required for an accessory dwelling unit, and a junior accessory dwelling unit shall be allowed within the existing walls of the primary dwelling. Parking shall not be required within one-half mile of a major transit stop.
